plugin.name: Mood Check-in
plugin.description: A gentle once-a-day pet check-in for noticing how you feel.
config.checkInTime.label: Check-in time
config.checkInTime.description: Local 24-hour time for the daily check-in, such as 16:00.
command.checkInNow.title: Check in now
command.summary.title: Show recent mood summary
command.summary.description: Hear a brief summary of recent check-ins.
command.pauseToday.title: Pause today
command.pauseToday.description: Skip the daily mood check-in until tomorrow.
indicator.label: Mood check-in
checkin.text: How are you feeling right now?
support.great: I'm glad to hear that. Enjoy this good moment.
support.okay: Thanks for checking in. A steady moment counts.
support.tired: Thanks for noticing. A small pause can help you reset.
support.stressed: Thanks for naming it. One gentle breath at a time.
speech.pausedToday: Paused for today. I'll check in tomorrow.
summary.recent: You have {count} recent check-ins. The most common one was {mood}.
